# Organizational DevelopmentCertificate Program

Organizational development and design are essential for building adaptable, high-performing companies. The AIHR Organizational Development Certificate Program provides practical OD training that helps you align strategy, culture, and structure to drive lasting results. You will strengthen collaboration across teams, lead successful culture change initiatives, and develop advanced organizational development skills that prepare you to guide growth and transformation in your organization.

DOWNLOAD SYLLABUS

ENROLL NOW

What members say about this program:

Packed with relevant information, useful worksheets and practical ideas to implement

The course highlighted the importance of applying frameworks

Provides a deep knowledge and understanding of all OD concepts

Trusted by 85,000+ 
HR professionals

## What you will learn

Strengthen your organizational development skills to drive adaptability and growth

Create and sustain a strong organizational culture, and successfully lead culture change initiatives

Develop a strategic organizational design program built on OD models and data-driven insights

Plan and deliver impactful OD interventions through strong stakeholder collaboration

### Why AIHR?

✓ Globally accredited & recognized (SHRM, HRCI, more…)

✓ Join 85,000+ members worldwide

✓ Future-focused and human-centric

✓ All the tools you need to level up your career

Read our 12470 reviews

## Organizational Development Certificate Program structure

Watch program overview video

40 hours of learning

Organizational Development

5 modules

• 11 lessons

• 8 hours

Build a stronger, more adaptable organization

Learn how to make organizations more effective, adaptable, and resilient in this online Organizational Development course. You will explore each phase of the OD process, apply data-driven insights to real business challenges, and strengthen collaboration and structure across teams with practical tools. By the end, you’ll be equipped to design and implement organizational changes that support resilience and long-term success.

Organizational Design

4 modules

• 11 lessons

• 7 hours

Future-proof your business with the right organizational design strategy

Design an organization where strategy, structure, and people drive results together. In this online course, you’ll learn how to develop and manage a successful organizational design program. Discover how to identify triggers for change, choose the right OD model, and gather data for meaningful analysis. By mastering the OD process from start to finish, you’ll be equipped to guide your company through every stage of transformation.

HR Operating Models

3 modules

• 7 lessons

• 3 hours

Design an efficient and effective HR operating model

Build a high-impact HR function that contributes to the strategic success of your organization. This course guides you step by step through designing an HR operating model tailored to your company’s structure, strategy, and goals. You’ll also explore how to leverage HR technology and establish core processes such as recruitment, benefits administration, and performance management.

Capstone Project

Project

• 3 hours

Apply everything you’ve learned in a practical, hands-on organizational development project. Working on a case study, you’ll complete a full organizational development cycle and implement an organizational design model. You’ll also create an outline of your organization’s culture. By the end of the project, you’ll have the confidence to apply your organizational development skills to real-world challenges.

You need to pass the capstone project to earn your certificate!

You can retry the capstone project and exam as often as you like.

All materials needed to complete the project will be provided.

Explore the full curriculum in pdf and **receive email reminders** when enrollment opens

Upon completion of the program, you will receive a digital certificate to showcase in the education section of your LinkedIn profile.

## FAQs

Need help making the right choice? Speak with an admissions advisor or send them a message.

### Why should I enroll in this Organizational Development Certification Program?

AIHR’s Organizational Development Certificate Program empowers you to shape organizations that perform and adapt. In this online OD training, you'll learn to implement organizational development strategies, design organizational structures, and guide culture change using practical, data-informed methods.

The program is built for professionals who want to move from reactive HR work to strategic impact, gaining the organizational development skills to build healthier, more resilient organizations. Upon completion, you’ll earn a globally recognized digital certificate, eligible for SHRM PDCs and accredited by HRCI and HRPA, to showcase your expertise in organizational development and design.

### Who is the AIHR Organizational Development Certificate Program for?

The AIHR Organizational Development Certificate Program is ideal for HR professionals who want to take a more strategic role in how their organization evolves. It’s designed for those looking to build practical organizational development and design skills that improve performance, strengthen culture, and lead change.

Whether you’re an HR business partner, HR generalist, or a starting OD specialist, this program helps you expand your expertise and make a measurable impact on organizational effectiveness and growth.

### How long do I have to complete AIHR Organizational Development Certificate Program, and is there a set schedule?

This certificate program is completely self-paced, giving you full flexibility to learn whenever it fits your schedule. You’ll have 12 months of access to the student portal, all lessons, and learning materials. Most learners complete the program in 3 to 4 months, investing around 35 hours in total to finish the courses and earn their digital OD certificate.

### Is the capstone project graded?

Yes. The capstone project is graded and serves as the final step to complete your Organizational Development Certificate Program. You’ll apply what you’ve learned by working through a case study, demonstrating your ability to use OD models, design org structures, and outline culture elements.

If your first submission doesn’t pass, you can resubmit as many times as needed. The program includes all the instructions, templates, and resources to help you successfully complete the project and get your digital OD certificate.

### What is the best organizational development certification?

The best organizational development certification depends on your career goals, experience level, and the skills you want to build. For HR professionals who want to strengthen their expertise in organizational design, culture transformation, and change management, the AIHR Organizational Development Certificate Program offers one of the most practical and comprehensive training options available.

The program is fully online, eligible for SHRM PDCs, and accredited by HRCI and HRPA. Professionals from companies such as Unilever, Meta, and Ikea have used the program to build the organizational development and design skills needed to help their organizations adapt, grow, and perform better through change.

### How do I become an OD practitioner?

Becoming an organizational development (OD) practitioner starts with understanding how organizations function and how people, processes, and structures interact. Most OD practitioners begin their careers in HR, learning and development, or management, then deepen their expertise through specialized organizational development training. Building a strong foundation in areas like change management, organizational design, and cultural transformation is essential.

The AIHR Organizational Development Certificate Program helps you gain these skills through practical learning so you can confidently apply OD principles in your organization and grow into an effective OD practitioner.

### What resources can help me get started in organizational development?

Get started in organizational development with these recommended resources:

* What Is Organizational Development? A Complete Guide
* 20 Organizational Development Examples From Top Businesses
* Organizational Design: A Complete Guide
* 12 Types of Organizational Culture You Should Know
* Leading a Successful Cultural Transformation at Your Organization

### Do you offer a money-back guarantee for certificate programs?

Yes! We pride ourselves on high-quality programs. That’s why we feel comfortable offering a 30-day money-back guarantee to ensure that you are 100% satisfied. If for any reason it’s not your thing, you can send us an email at [\](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) to request a full refund.

### Is this program eligible for recertification credits by SHRM, HRCI and others?

The Academy to Innovate HR (AIHR) is a trusted recertification partner of the world’s leading HR Associations, together representing over 1,000,000 HR professionals globally and offers HR programs eligible for recertification credits.

With AIHR, your learning hours count twice — once toward building in-demand HR skills, and again toward maintaining your existing credentials. 

This program is eligible for:

* **30** SHRM PDCs
* **30 Business** Business HRCI Credits
* **30** HRPA PDCs

See the full list of HR associations offering credits for the **Organizational Development Certificate Program**.

Plus, as a registered education provider on LinkedIn, AIHR makes it easy to showcase your new credentials directly on your profile, boosting your professional visibility.

5.0Nishendran Naidoo from Cape Town,South Africa

Excellent Programme with key insights and extensive practical tips on how to be an effective OD Consultant.

Posted 6 days ago

5.0Jennifer Firstenburg from Phoenix,United States

Having recently gone through a merger and acquisition, this training was incredibly valuable in helping me understand why two seemingly similar companies struggled to blend. One was a privately held organization with a strong clan culture rooted in family and loyalty, while the other was driven by market culture focused on growth and competition. The Competing Values Framework gave me the language to finally make sense of the friction we experienced and why initiatives that worked in one culture fell flat in the other. My only regret is not having this training before the merger, I'd strongly recommend it to any HR professional navigating a cultural integration effort.

Posted 1 weeks ago

4.0Sofia Ribeiro from Lisbon,Portugal

This program provided a strong and practical foundation in Organizational Development and Design. I particularly appreciated how the content moved beyond theory and focused on real-life application through case studies and the capstone exam. The frameworks (such as MOE, OD inquiry cycle, and change models) were clearly explained and easy to apply. Overall, it was a valuable experience that strengthened my ability to approach complex organizational challenges in a structured and strategic way.

Posted 3 weeks ago

5.0Michael Lorenca from Charlotte,United States

Excellent course to develop OD skills for HR generalists.

Posted 3 weeks ago
